meta_title: For Freelancers: email automation to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to email automation and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Email Automation to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about marketing. Learn to build automated email systems for your clients using Antigravity and Claude Code in this beginner-friendly guide.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to scale. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid infrastructure and Claude Code for automated logic, you can build self-sustaining email funnels that nurture leads while you sleep. This approach turns your development skills into a high-value marketing asset that clients will pay premium rates for.
content.intro:
You’ve spent years mastering the stack, but every time the 'M' word—marketing—comes up, your productivity hits a wall. You’re a builder, not a copywriter, and the thought of managing complex CRM campaigns feels like a distraction from the code that actually pays the bills.

But here is the truth: marketing isn't a dark art; it's just another system to be engineered. By treating email automation as a software project rather than a creative chore, you can build high-converting, automated engines that do the heavy lifting for you and your clients. Let’s turn your technical edge into a marketing powerhouse.

steps.title: Define the Trigger Logic
steps.description: Map out exactly when an email should fire. Whether it's a signup event or a lead score change, clear logic prevents spam and increases open rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a user-event trigger table that tracks timestamps and event types for automated email dispatching.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a database migration for a triggers table with columns: user_id, event_type, status, and payload'

steps.title: Establish the Email Service Provider (ESP) Connection
steps.description: Standardize your integration layer. Using a robust API like Resend or Postmark ensures deliverability without managing your own SMTP servers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular email service provider client using the Resend SDK with error handling and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'install resend and create a service module that handles email sending with async/await patterns'

steps.title: Implement Template Rendering
steps.description: Decouple your content from your code. Use Handlebars or EJS so you can update email copy without redeploying your core application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a template engine wrapper that accepts a template name and data object, injecting values into HTML strings.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a templates folder and a utility function to render email bodies from EJS files'

steps.title: Queue Management for Reliability
steps.description: Never send emails directly from the request cycle. Use a queue to ensure that even if the ESP is slow, your app remains lightning-fast.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup a simple bullmq or redis-based queue structure to handle outgoing email jobs asynchronously.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize a worker process that consumes email jobs from a redis queue'

steps.title: Automated Analytics Hooks
steps.description: Add tracking pixels or link redirects to measure engagement. If you can't measure it, you can't optimize it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware function to track email link clicks by updating a database record before redirecting the user.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a redirect route that logs click events and forwards the user to the destination URL'

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated sub-domain for transactional emails to protect your main domain's sender reputation.
Implement a 'cool-down' period in your queue to prevent sending multiple emails to the same user within a 24-hour window.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your email templates to ensure no broken tags reach your customers.
Keep your email content plain-text focused; high-HTML designs often trigger spam filters and perform worse on mobile.
Automate the 'Unsubscribe' process immediately; keeping your list clean is the single most important factor in long-term deliverability.
content.next_steps: Once your first automation is live, focus on building a 'dashboard' view for your clients so they can see the performance metrics without needing to touch the code.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting 'marketing' be the bottleneck to your growth. Build systems that work for you, impress your clients with professional-grade automation, and reclaim your time for high-impact development. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
